entity.summary: HeLa-chain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity pools, and active spot trading for the HeLa ecosystem.
entity.notes: Current first-party Cytoswap domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Cytoswap as a HeLa CLMM DEX and reports current TVL and recent DEX volume. CoinGecko independently identifies the exchange under the cytoswap.com domain. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Cytoswap official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Cytoswap domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Cytoswap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Cytoswap as a HeLa CLMM DEX and reports current TVL and recent and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: Cytoswap exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies Cytoswap under the cytoswap.com domain, corroborating the entity identity.
